summary: Stripe Connect 3-profile 2-step selector testing complete. All backend APIs working correctly with real Stripe test mode. Frontend 2-step profile selector (Particulier/Professionnel → Indépendant/Société), ConnectStatusCard with profile_type badge, and ChangeProfileTypeModal with conditional Stripe reset warning all functioning properly. Mobile responsive at 375px.

backend_api_tests: ✅ GET /api/connect/status returns profile_type and business_type fields
✅ POST /api/connect/onboard with profile_type=particulier creates Stripe individual account
✅ POST /api/connect/onboard with profile_type=independant creates Stripe individual account
✅ POST /api/connect/onboard with profile_type=company creates Stripe company account
✅ POST /api/connect/reset from particulier to independant does NOT delete Stripe account (stripe_reset: false)
✅ POST /api/connect/reset from independant to company DOES delete Stripe account (stripe_reset: true)
✅ All endpoints require authentication (401 without token)
frontend_profile_selector_2step: ✅ Step 1: 'Particulier' and 'Professionnel' cards shown when connect_status=not_started and profile_type=null
frontend_connect_status_card: ✅ ConnectStatusCard shows profile_type badge when type is set
✅ Badge displays 'Indépendant / Auto-entrepreneur' for independant profile
✅ 'Modifier mon type de profil' link appears when profile_type is set
frontend_change_type_modal: ✅ Change type modal opens when clicking 'Modifier mon type de profil'
✅ Modal shows 2 other options (not current type)
✅ 'Particulier' option visible (no Stripe reset warning - same Stripe type)
✅ 'Société / Organisation' option visible WITH Stripe reset warning (different Stripe type)
✅ Warning text: 'Ce changement nécessitera de relancer la vérification Stripe'
frontend_mobile_responsive: ✅ Profile selector cards stack vertically at 375px viewport
✅ Professionnel card: width=301px, positioned below Particulier card
✅ Balance cards stack vertically on mobile
✅ Connect status card displays properly on mobile
✅ Change modal displays properly on mobile

critical_code_review_comments: Backend PROFILE_TO_STRIPE mapping correctly maps particulier→individual, independant→individual, company→company
Reset logic correctly differentiates between same Stripe type (DB update only) and different Stripe type (Stripe account deletion)
Frontend ProfileTypeSelector implements 2-step selection with inline expansion for Professionnel sub-options
ChangeProfileTypeModal correctly shows Stripe reset warning only when business_type changes
All data-testid attributes properly added for testing
seed_data_creation: Test user wallet reset to clean state (profile_type=null, connect_status=not_started) for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: 3-profile Stripe Connect onboarding fully tested. Backend uses real Stripe test mode (sk_test_51TDBIh...). Test user stripe-test@nlyt.io wallet state varies based on test execution. ProfileTypeSelector shows 2-step selection: Step 1 (Particulier/Professionnel), Step 2 (Indépendant/Société when Professionnel clicked). ConnectStatusCard shows profile_type badge. ChangeProfileTypeModal shows 2 other options with Stripe reset warning only when business_type changes (individual↔company).
